Identity & Ideology
The rules that govern everything in this brief

The World

FREE operates within the OWJV universe — Other Worldly, Just Visiting. SINE NOCTIS is Act II of the Other World Mythos. The world is myth-conscious and deliberate. It does not announce itself. It exists and lets the audience find it. The website explains everything and nothing. Those who seek shall find.

The Two Image Formats

Structural Rule

Two distinct formats exist and must never be confused. Abstract stills — one-liner cards — carry Outfit text burned directly onto the image. Image and caption are one object. No post caption. Film stills always post clean. No overlay. Caption lives in post text below: title, credits, then the Outfit hook line as line three. This distinction is structural and non-negotiable.

but that painting is otherworldly.

One-Liner Card
Abstract Still
Text burned on image. No post caption. No credits. Posted alone.
Film Still
Clean — Caption Below
NIGHTFALL
director: @codenameblanco music: @woods.sndz
it's such an otherworldly sight.

The Voice

Bebas Neue carries authority — titles, labels, structure. Outfit Medium 500 is the living voice — captions, one-liners, subtitle overlays. Outfit is always lowercase, always muted at rgba(255,255,255,0.55). It does not shout. It surfaces.

SINE NOCTIS
OWJV · ACT II
Bebas Neue — Authority
ALL CAPS. High tracking. Titles, act labels, nav, headers. Not for captions.
sine noctis
not from here.
Outfit Medium — The Voice
Lowercase. Muted. All captions, overlays, hook lines, carousel slides. The OWJV voice.

The Language Rule

Never say
my new project is coming
stay tuned
dropping soon
excited to share
Say this
Act II is in motion.
the universe keeps building.
OWJV.
FINE BY ME is still out there.
One-Liner Cards
Abstract stills — Outfit caption burned on image · no post caption · no credits
Not Final

Captions are placeholder. Final lines TBD — may be replaced with or supplemented by lyrics from SINE NOCTIS directly. Do not post without approval.

text bottom-anchored · opacity 0.52
Production Spec
  • Font: Outfit Medium 500 · letter-spacing: 0.01em
  • Color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55) standard — adjust per still brightness
  • Placement: center on balanced frames · bottom-anchored where light pools low
  • No OWJV mark, no credits, no post caption. Image posts alone.
  • One per week minimum. No context given. Ever.
  • Do not post two similar tones back to back
Film Stills
Clean source material — no overlay · caption lives below the image in post text
Format Rule

Film stills are never overlaid with text. They post clean. The Outfit hook line belongs in the caption field beneath the image as the third line — after title and credits. This is structurally distinct from the one-liner cards.

Usage
  • Caption format posts — image clean, 3-line text caption below
  • Film grid — replicate FINExME 6-cell format for SN track stills
  • Reel cover frame — darkest still + one Outfit sentence burned at bottom
  • Blurred / cropped variant of any still → "you almost missed it." pre-drop post

Rollout Framework
Pre-drop through orbit — platform-tagged execution order

Pre-Drop — Descent Phase

WK 4–3
IGOne-liner card series begins. Abstract still + Outfit caption burned in. One per week.
IGMotif posts: BMW interior clip, Alpinestars jacket. No caption. No context.
THREADSSingle SN lines. No visual. No credits. Just the sentence.
WK 2
IGBlurred film still. Caption: "you almost missed it."
IGAct I vs Act II art side-by-side. Caption: "the shift."
IGCaption audit — update all existing posts to 3-line format.
WK 1
IG7-slide carousel. One Outfit line per slide. Final slide: album cover, full bleed.
ALL"Act II is in motion." Nothing else.
IGScore clip — 15–30s SN audio, dark visual. No caption.
DROP DAY
IGBlack frame. One Outfit line. Statement — not announcement.
IG REELFull 42–65s film clip. One-word caption.
THREADSThe lyric the film is built around. No visual.
REEL COVEROne Outfit sentence burned into darkest frame.

Post-Drop — Orbit Phase

WK 1
IGMotif series deepens. BMW, Alpinestars. No explanations. Ever.
IGRepost pre-drop silent content — reads differently now that SN exists.
WK 2–3
IGRain on car window loop. Pilgrim underneath. No caption.
IG"FINE BY ME is still out there." Post cold. No context.
IGCOMEBACC beat clip. No title. Random Tuesday. Let it float.
ONGOING
ALL"OWJV." Periodically. No explanation. Ever.
IGOne-liner card series never stops. Infrastructure, not promotion.
ALLRefer to Otherland, Sex Symbol in passing. Already real.
Content Formats
How each post type is structured and executed

Carousel — SINE NOCTIS Announcement (7 Slides)

1 / 7
Slide Order
Notes
  • Outfit 500 · rgba(255,255,255,0.55) · consistent every slide
  • Slide 7: album cover full bleed — no text at all
  • No post caption — let the carousel speak
  • Full swipes signal to algorithm — keep lines short

BMW / Engine — Motif Video

Engine noise only · 15–30s · No music · No face
Blanc Shoot Needed
BMW Interior — Night
This photo is the brief. Same angle, red ambient glow, dashboard lit, nav on screen. Engine idle or cold start. Static camera. No face. No music. No caption when posted.

33 ghosts. still moving.

Format
Score Clip
Film still or black + 15–30s SN audio. Outfit caption overlay optional. No post caption, or single OWJV line only beneath credits.

Cross-Platform — Same Content, 3 Outputs

IG Reel
Full Clip
42–65s. One-word caption. Reel cover = darkest film still with one Outfit sentence burned in at bottom.

The one line the film is built around. Text only. No visual. No credits. Let it breathe.

Darkest still from the film. One Outfit Medium sentence overlaid. This is the thumbnail — choose deliberately.

FINExME Era
WHITE TOE — Lyric Card
Bold all-caps Bebas. Act I format. SN shifts to lowercase Outfit. Both coexist as Act I vs Act II visual language.

Still Needs Shooting
  • Leather jacket alone in dark room — one overhead light source. Post caption: "shelter."
  • Hands close-up — no face, moody light. Post caption: "wrote this at 3."
  • Rain on car window at night — static camera, Pilgrim playing on radio underneath. No caption.

Typography Guide
The caption system — identified, specified, applied

Reference — IG Screenshot

source — "It's such an otherworldly sight."

Identification
  • Origin: Instagram native subtitle engine · iOS rendering
  • System font: SF Pro Display — Apple OS, not installable
  • Weight: Medium 500 · not bold
  • Color: rgba(255,255,255,0.55) — muted, not pure white
  • Spacing: letter-spacing 0.01em · near-default, slightly open
  • Case: sentence case, lowercase where possible
Web Equivalent
  • Outfit Medium 500 — Google Fonts, free
  • Closest match to SF Pro Display geometry
  • Single-story a · humanist sans · same x-height
  • Use everywhere the IG subtitle is the reference

Sizes in Use

it's such an otherworldly sight.
24px · Reel title overlay / burned frame
but that painting is otherworldly.
18px · One-liner card (square post)
not from here.
15px · Abstract still card (9:16 post)
three acts. frozen still. alone this time.
13px · Carousel slides
it's such an otherworldly sight.
12px · Caption hook line — third line below credits

CSS Spec

/* OWJV caption — all black screen text + overlays */
font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif;
font-weight: 500;
letter-spacing: 0.01em;
color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.55);
text-align: center;
line-height: 1.6;

/* Black frame drop variant — lower opacity, left-anchored */
color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.28);
text-align: left;
Site Map
Every page on atnocost.cc — what it is, how to access it

Public Pages

/ — Homepage
  • Hero with "not from here." tagline, FREE logotype, two CTAs (Hear, Visit the Other World)
  • Catalog grid: FINExME (Act I) and SINE NOCTIS (Act II) cards
  • Streaming links (Spotify, Apple Music, TIDAL)
  • Email capture for fan drip sequence
  • Mythos section with lunar navigation
  • Other Media section
/finexme — Act I Album Page
  • FINExME album page — red palette, 7-track listing
  • Manuscript excerpt (dialogue format, low opacity)
  • Streaming links, back cover design by Choice
/sinenoctis — Act II Album Page
  • SINE NOCTIS EP page — monochrome palette, 3-track listing
  • Pilgrim interlude section with snow gallery (4 photos, Brandon Brown)
  • Manuscript excerpts with speaker labels (Her, Voice, Free)
/otherworld — Other World Hub
  • Eyebrow: "Other Worldly, Just Visiting" — heading: "Other World"
  • Act I and Act II cards linking to album pages
  • Explores section: Mythos, Timeline, Cinema, Clips
/cinema — Visual Works
  • Subtitle: "Other World in motu."
  • FINExME era: AT NO COST (trailer), FINE BY ME (film)
  • SINE NOCTIS era: ANTE, VESPERA, NOCTEM (teasers), SINE NOCTIS (full visual)
  • Embedded YouTube players per visual
/timeline — Chronological Timeline
  • Horizontal scrolling timeline — all releases by era
  • FINExME era, SINE NOCTIS era, future releases
/clips — Short-Form Content
  • Short-form video clips (TikTok, Reels, Shorts format)
  • ~60% disabled, marked "Coming Soon"
/epk — Electronic Press Kit
  • Public press page — artist bio, current release, catalog
  • Visual works, press photos, coverage, contact info, streaming links
  • LOCKED structure — swap elements per cycle, don't restructure

Token-Gated Pages

Access

Token-gated pages require a ?token=XXXX query parameter in the URL. Tokens are generated at /internal/tokens. Without a valid token, visitors see the gate page.

/ekthesis — Business Case / Proposition
  • 12-section investor/partner pitch deck
  • Artist profile, thesis, Other World universe, music×film model
  • Market opportunity, audience, monetization, comparables, revenue projections
  • Gate page (/ekthesis/gate): "A Proposition for the Other World" — request access link
  • Footer links here as "Proposition"
/brief — Creative Brief (this document)
  • Redirects to static /_sn_brief.html
  • Gate page (/brief/gate): "SINE NOCTIS · Creative Brief" — request access link

Internal / Admin (Password-Gated)

Access

Internal pages require login at /internal/login. Uses INTERNAL_AUTH_TOKEN cookie set after correct password entry.

/internal — Admin Dashboard
  • Tools: links to Outreach and Token Generator
  • Artist One-Sheet, Other World visual bible
  • Production standards and design considerations
/internal/outreach — Press Outreach Tool
  • Manage 193 press contacts across 5 tiers (VIP, T1–T4)
  • Send personalized emails, track status (pending/sent/bounced/opened)
  • Batch send per tier with 2-minute stagger and cancel capability
  • Sender: free@atnocost.cc (T1–T3), freeisavailable@atnocost.cc (T4)
/internal/tokens — Token Generator
  • Create and revoke access tokens for ekthesis, brief, and site gates
  • Copy shareable URLs with tokens embedded

Key Details

Domain & Hosting
  • Domain: atnocost.cc (Cloudflare DNS)
  • Hosting: Vercel
  • Stack: Next.js + Tailwind CSS v4
Email Infrastructure
  • Outbound: Resend API (DKIM/SPF verified)
  • Inbound: Cloudflare Email Routing → Gmail
  • free@atnocost.cc — artist voice
  • freeisavailable@atnocost.cc — imprint voice
